name: Sun-Dried Tomato Vinaigrette
recipeIngredient: Garlic clove, ½ (minced and mixed with ½ teaspoon salt to form a paste)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, simmer the sun-dried tomatoes in 2 inches of water for 3 minutes, or until they are tender. Drain them and mince.
2. In a bowl, whisk together the tomatoes, vinegars, and garlic paste. Slowly add the olive oil, whisking continuously until the vinaigrette is emulsified.
3. Stir in the basil. Makes about 2/3 cup.
This recipe is from "THE BEST OF GOURMET 1992."
